metadata.description: Quality-gated skill authoring for Claude Code

plugins.name: skill-forge-judge
plugins.description: Evaluate any LLM prompt (SKILL.md, CLAUDE.md, system prompts) for quality with grouped dimensional scoring, letter grades, and actionable findings.

plugins.name: skill-forge-hitl
plugins.description: Apply a numbered list one item at a time with status board, per-item approve/skip, approve-all mode, and commits after each approved item.

plugins.name: skill-forge-create
plugins.description: Create a new SKILL.md via discovery recap, pattern selection, spec fetch, knowledge delta discipline, and quality gate.

plugins.name: skill-forge-update
plugins.description: Update an existing SKILL.md with recap, description drift detection, change elicitation, and quality validation.

plugins.name: skill-forge-recap
plugins.description: Read a skill's body and report what it actually does vs. what the description claims: drift, undeclared behaviors, verdict.
